word: G1832 - ἔξεστι - éxesti - ex'-es-tee - Be lawful

sections.paragraph:
ἔξεστι - exesti - ex'-es-tee

Third person singular present indicative of a compound of G1537 and G1510; so also ἐξόν exon; neuter present participle of the same (with or without some form of G1510 expressed); impersonally it is right (through the figurative idea of being out in public): - be lawful, let, X may (-est).
